---
name: Feature Request
about: Track a planned capability using the AgentGate feature template.
title: "feat: "
labels: ["type:feature", "review:pending"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

- What you want to build
- Why this matters now

## Problem Statement

Describe the user-facing pain this feature solves.

## Recommended Solution

Describe the proposed design and key trade-offs.

## Implementation Steps

List concrete, ordered implementation steps.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Clear and testable definition of done.

## Security Notes

Describe security constraints, threat model notes, and secret handling (if any).

## Open Questions

List unresolved design questions.

## Source Spec

- Source doc: `docs/features/<file>.md`
- Source status: `<planned|approved|...>`
- Source priority: `<high|medium|low>`
